name: Optical Fiber Communications
tagline: Dielectric waveguides carrying terabits on photons — low loss, high bandwidth, immunity to copper theft
problem:
Copper bandwidth fatigues with distance: high frequencies attenuate, crosstalk whispers between pairs, and repeaters multiply noise. Optical fibre guides infrared light in a glass core so pure that transoceanic links need fewer regenerations than coax ever could — if splices are clean, bends gentle, and lasers stable.

Nonlinear optics punishes hubris: high launch powers create four-wave mixing and self-phase modulation that smear pulses across dense wavelength-division multiplexing systems. Chromatic dispersion spreads short pulses unless fibres, lasers, and compensators conspire.

Last-mile economics fought trenches and rights-of-way until demand for bits exceeded dislike of construction dust. Inside data centres, fibre is the quiet workhorse tying top-of-rack switches to spine fabrics.

Collapse recovery still values fibre craft: cleave angles, fusion splicer calibration, and cleaning sticks are small tools that gate gigabits.
overview:
Single-mode fibre confines light to one propagating mode with a tiny core; lasers launch narrow linewidths that survive long haul. Multimode fibre serves short reaches with cheaper optics inside buildings. Preforms are built by MCVD or outside vapour deposition, drawn to kilometres of hair-fine glass, coated in acrylate, and cabled with strength members.

Erbium-doped fibre amplifiers boost C-band signals without optical-electrical-optical conversion; Raman amplification uses the fibre itself as gain medium. Coherent detection treats light like RF — DSP recovers phase and polarisation.

Connectors (SC, LC, MPO) trade loss against convenience; angled polish reduces reflections that destabilise lasers. OTDR sends pulses to map faults versus distance — indispensable storytelling for crews.

Submarine cables add armour, power feed to repeaters, and branching units — geography with amplifiers every few dozen kilometres.

principles.name: V-number and modes
principles.explanation: Single-mode cutoff ensures one spatial mode — avoids modal dispersion.

principles.name: Material and waveguide dispersion
principles.explanation: Chromatic dispersion broadens pulses; dispersion-shifted fibre trades against nonlinear penalties.

principles.name: WDM crosstalk
principles.explanation: Imperfect filters leak neighbours; guard bands cost capacity.

principles.name: Shot noise limit
principles.explanation: Photons arrive Poisson — sensitivity floors for given BER.

rawMaterials.name: Silicon tetrachloride
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Ultra-pure silicon tetrachloride and germanium dopants for preforms on Earth; ship spooled single-mode fibre off-world until local draw towers and dry gas chemistry justify on-site manufacture

rawMaterials.name: Germanium dopant
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Germanium tetrachloride or alternative index dopants tuned to your process — document refractive index profiles, not only supplier names

rawMaterials.name: Indium phosphide wafers
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Indium phosphide wafers for long-haul lasers; silicon photonics where integration beats raw laser wall-plug efficiency

buildSteps.title: Design span loss and dispersion budgets before ordering reels
buildSteps.description: Sum connector losses, splice losses, fibre attenuation per km, splitter penalties, and system margin. Pick laser wavelength and fibre type together — they are not independent.
buildSteps.warningNote: Optimistic budgets die in the first rain

buildSteps.title: Prepare workspace cleaner than you think necessary
buildSteps.description: Close HVAC vents that blow dust; lint-free wipes only; inspect cleavers under magnification. Label every patch cord directionally — chaos grows exponentially in dense racks.
buildSteps.warningNote: One fingerprint on a ferrule can cost a day

buildSteps.title: Cleave and fusion-splice on a stable table
buildSteps.description: Strip gently; clean with approved fluid; cleave once confidently. Archive OTDR traces after each splice event with GPS or rack coordinates.
buildSteps.warningNote: Re-cleaving too many times shortens fibre to unusable stubs

buildSteps.title: Test bidirectionally at planned wavelength
buildSteps.description: Swap OTDR ends to catch reflective faults hidden one-way. Verify polarisation extinction if using coherent gear.
buildSteps.warningNote: Mismatched test wavelength lies about loss

buildSteps.title: Document as-built and train handlers
buildSteps.description: Print diagrams with cable IDs; teach bend-radius discipline and trunk strain relief. Schedule re-OTDR after building moves — forklifts murder trays.
buildSteps.warningNote: Macro-bends raise loss slowly — temperature shifts unmask them

history.event: Low-loss fused silica fibre breakthrough at Corning.
history.person: Robert Maurer, Donald Keck, Peter Schultz

history.event: TAT-8 first transatlantic submarine fibre cable.

inventors.name: Charles K. Kao
inventors.contribution: Pioneering work on fibre communications feasibility

impact:
Fibre carries the bulk backbone of the internet — satellites and radio are edges; glass is the spine.

Understanding OTDR is understanding archaeology for light.

videos.title: Fibre drawing tower
videos.description: Factory tours of preform to fibre.
